audit_items.proof_trace: When `success == false`, the guard at L30 is unconditionally entered and exactly one of two `revert` statements fires: if `response.length > 0`, assembly `revert(add(response, 32), returndataSize)` bubbles the reason; otherwise `revert LowLevelCallFailed()` fires. L43 `return response` is only reachable when `success == true`, so no silent-return path exists for the failure case.
